title: FN-DSA (FALCON) Overview
description: Introduction to FN-DSA, the upcoming NIST post-quantum signature standard based on FALCON, featuring compact signatures through NTRU lattices and fast Fourier sampling.
learningObjectives: Understand FN-DSA's position in NIST standardization
Learn the key features of FALCON-based signatures
Compare FN-DSA with ML-DSA and SLH-DSA
Learn about signature size and performance trade-offs
